Uhuru Kenyatta is a thug just like William Ruto. He is so active in the succession politics because he is fighting not to answer questions regarding Ksh 4.6T Odious Debts including Ksh 1T Eurobond that never reached the country. Actually, Uhuru Kenyatta is more comfortable with William Ruto as the President than anyone else. If you think Uhuru and Ruto are enemies, then you must ask yourself this question, " Why is William Ruto's killer regime launching a fresh bid to stop Odious Debts Petition, rather than auditing public debts?" Uhuru and Ruto are crooks and if you think the thug from Ichaweri is with you in the struggle, mtashangaa sana. He is much interested in controlling Nairobi politics, destabilizing the opposition by keeping William Ruto in power and to groom a future puppet who will protect their looting businesses. Wake up!
